title: setState Increment
description: Update a counter on screen when a button is pressed using setState.
problemStatement:
Manage internal state! Create a `StatefulWidget` with an `int _counter = 0`. Add an `ElevatedButton` that, when pressed, calls `setState()` to increment the counter.

**Requirement:** Display the counter value in a `Text` widget above the button.
hints: The UI only rebuilds if the change happens inside a `setState(() { ... })` block.
expectedOutput: A working counter app where the number increases on every tap.
